quality.spell_summary: A useful 0-level utility spell granting remote object manipulation up to 10 lbs, limited by distance and action economy.

mechanics.action_economy: Requires an action each turn to control, balanced against its 1-minute duration.
mechanics.range_and_duration: Standard range (30 ft) and duration (1 minute) for a low-level utility spell.
mechanics.limitations_assessment: The 10-pound weight limit and inability to attack or activate magic items are crucial balancing factors preventing it from being overpowered.

suggested_refinements: No critical errors found; the data is consistent and mechanically sound for standard TTRPG rulesets (e.g., D&D 5e).

llm_audit.archivist_notes: Data entry for Mage Hand is complete and accurate based on standard reference material. No ZOD errors detected.
